reviews.label: reviews
reviews.review1: Absolutely incredible build quality. Sets up in minutes and the performance is exactly as advertised. Worth every penny — I've already recommended it to three friends.
reviews.review2: I was skeptical about purchasing high-end gear online but the packaging was perfect and delivery was fast. Zero regrets. Customer support was also top notch when I had a question.
reviews.review3: Great product overall. Took off one star only because setup documentation could be clearer for first-timers, but performance-wise this thing is an absolute beast.
reviews.review4: Third purchase from GamingStore. Always reliable, always top-tier. The team helped me pick the right configuration for my needs and delivery was ahead of schedule.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Builders Worldwide
testimonials.subtext: Over 12,000+ happy customers — here's what they say.
testimonials.review1: Arrived fully assembled and tested. The cable management is immaculate — I've built PCs for 10 years and this is cleaner than anything I've done myself.
testimonials.review2: The ultrawide changed everything about my workflow. Colors are perfect out of the box and the USB-C charging is a game-changer for my laptop setup.
testimonials.review3: Best chair I've ever owned. After 8 hours of gaming and work, zero back pain. The lumbar support is exactly what my chiropractor ordered.
testimonials.review4: GamingStore had it in stock when nobody else did, shipped in 2 days. Running everything maxed at 4K without breaking a sweat. Absolutely worth it.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.needUrgentHelpSub: Visit our {{faqLink}} for instant answers to common questions.
faqPage.q1: What payment methods do you accept?
faqPage.a1: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All transactions are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.
faqPage.a2: Standard orders ship within 1–2 business days. Pre-built systems and custom builds ship within 3–5 business days after assembly and testing. Express overnight shipping is available at checkout.
faqPage.a3: Yes — we offer hassle-free 30-day returns on all products in original condition. Custom-built PCs are eligible for return within 14 days if there's a defect. Simply contact our support team to start a return.
faqPage.q4: Do your products come with a warranty?
faqPage.a4: All custom-built systems come with a 2-year full parts and labour warranty. Individual components carry their manufacturer's warranty — typically 1–3 years. Our team handles all warranty claims on your behalf.
faqPage.a5: Absolutely. Once your order ships you'll receive a tracking email. You can also visit the Track Order page and enter your order ID (format: GS-XXXXXX) to see real-time shipping updates.
faqPage.q6: Do you offer custom PC builds?
faqPage.a6: Yes! Our PC Builder tool lets you configure every component — GPU, CPU, RAM, storage, cooling, and more. Every build is assembled and stress-tested by our technicians before shipping.
faqPage.q7: What if my item arrives damaged?
faqPage.a7: Please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos of the damage. We'll arrange a replacement or full refund and cover all return shipping costs at no charge to you.
faqPage.a8: We currently ship to the US, Canada, UK, EU, Saudi Arabia, and UAE. International orders may be subject to customs duties. Free shipping applies to domestic orders over $199.
faqPage.q9: Can I upgrade my custom PC later?
faqPage.a9: Yes. Our support team can advise on component upgrades for any system we've built. We also offer an in-store upgrade service — bring your system to any of our showroom locations.
faqPage.q10: How do I reach customer support?
faqPage.a10: Email us at support@gamingstore.com, call +1 (800) 123-4567 (Mon–Fri, 9am–8pm EST), or use the Contact Us form for a guaranteed 24-hour written response.

returnsPage.p1Desc: Changed your mind? Return any item within 30 days of delivery in original condition and packaging for a full refund or exchange.
returnsPage.p2Desc: For defective or incorrectly shipped items we provide a prepaid return label at no charge to you.
returnsPage.p3Desc: Once we receive and inspect your return, refunds are processed within 3–5 business days to your original payment method.
returnsPage.p4Desc: Custom-configured PCs are eligible for return within 14 days if there's a confirmed hardware defect. We'll repair, replace, or refund.

returnsPage.step4: Ship it back using the prepaid label we provide
returnsPage.exceptionsDesc: Opened software, consumables (thermal paste, cable ties), and items marked 'Final Sale' are not eligible for return.

warrantyPage.systemsDesc: Full 2-year parts and labour warranty. We handle everything — from replacing a faulty GPU to full system rebuilds.
warrantyPage.componentsDesc: All components carry their manufacturer's warranty (typically 1–3 years). We act as your single point of contact for all claims.
warrantyPage.peripheralsDesc: 1-year warranty on all keyboards, mice, headsets, and monitors. Manufacturing defects are covered from day one.
warrantyPage.claimsDesc: Contact our support team with your order number and a description of the issue. We aim to resolve all warranty claims within 5 business days.

builderGuidePage.title: Build Your First PC
builderGuidePage.intro: Building a PC is easier than you think. Follow this step-by-step guide and you'll have a powerful custom machine up and running in an afternoon.
builderGuidePage.step1Desc: Decide what you'll use the PC for — gaming, content creation, or both. Set a realistic budget. For 1080p gaming, $800–$1,200 is a solid starting point. 4K or creative work starts around $1,500+.
builderGuidePage.step2Desc: The CPU and motherboard must share the same socket type (e.g., AMD AM5, Intel LGA1700). Pick your CPU first, then find a compatible motherboard. ATX boards offer most expansion; Micro-ATX saves space.
builderGuidePage.step3Desc: 16 GB DDR5 is the current sweet spot for gaming. For storage, a 1 TB NVMe SSD gives fast boot and load times. Add a secondary SATA SSD or HDD for extra space if needed.
builderGuidePage.step4Desc: The GPU drives gaming performance. NVIDIA RTX 4070 is excellent for 1440p; RTX 4090 dominates 4K. On AMD's side, RX 7800 XT offers great value. Match GPU power to your monitor resolution.
builderGuidePage.step5Desc: Pick a case that fits your motherboard form factor. For the PSU, add up all component TDPs and add 20% headroom — 750W covers most builds; 850W+ for high-end GPUs. Look for 80+ Gold or Platinum efficiency.
builderGuidePage.step6Desc: Install the CPU into the motherboard first, then RAM, then the cooler. Mount the motherboard in the case, install the PSU, connect storage, slot in the GPU last. Route cables before buttoning up the case.
builderGuidePage.step7Desc: Good cable management improves airflow and looks great. Use Velcro straps to bundle cables behind the motherboard tray. Leave front and rear fans unobstructed. Check all connectors are firmly seated.
builderGuidePage.step8Desc: Power on and enter BIOS to verify all components are detected. Set RAM to XMP/EXPO profile for rated speeds. Boot from a USB drive with Windows or Linux. Install drivers and enjoy your build!
builderGuidePage.ctaDesc: Use our PC Builder tool to configure every component and let us handle the assembly and testing.

liveChatPage.onlineSub: Our product specialists are online Mon–Fri, 9am–8pm EST. Average response time: under 2 minutes.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: GamingStore is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, why we collect it, and how we keep it safe.
privacyPage.s1Desc: We collect information you provide directly — such as name, email, shipping address, and payment details when you make a purchase. We also collect browsing data automatically (pages visited, cart activity, device type) through cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience.
privacyPage.s2Desc: Your data is used to process orders, send shipping confirmations, provide customer support, personalise product recommendations, and send promotional emails (only if you opt in). We never sell your personal data to third parties.
privacyPage.s3Desc: We share data only with trusted service providers — our payment processor (Stripe), shipping carriers (UPS, FedEx, DHL), and email platform — solely to fulfil your order. All partners are contractually bound to protect your data.
privacyPage.s4Desc: We use essential cookies to keep your cart active, analytics cookies (Google Analytics) to understand site usage, and optional marketing cookies for relevant ads. You can manage your preferences in Cookie Settings at any time.
privacyPage.s5Desc: Order records are kept for 7 years for tax and legal compliance. Account data is retained as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us.
privacyPage.s6Desc: Depending on your location, you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data; object to processing; and data portability. To exercise these rights, email privacy@gamingstore.com.
privacyPage.s7Desc: Questions about this policy? Email privacy@gamingstore.com or write to GamingStore, 142 West 34th Street, New York, NY 10001.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: By using GamingStore you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
termsPage.s1Desc: You may use GamingStore for lawful personal shopping only. You agree not to scrape, copy, or redistribute site content; attempt to gain unauthorised access to our systems; or use automated tools to place orders.
termsPage.s2Desc: All prices are in USD and include applicable taxes unless stated otherwise. We reserve the right to correct pricing errors. An order confirmation email constitutes acceptance of your order. We may cancel orders if a product becomes unavailable or a pricing error occurred.
termsPage.s3Desc: Delivery estimates are provided in good faith but are not guaranteed. Risk of loss transfers to you upon handover to the carrier. GamingStore is not liable for delays caused by customs, natural disasters, or carrier failures.
termsPage.s4Desc: Our 30-day return policy is described in full on the Returns & Refunds page. Custom-built systems are eligible for return within 14 days of confirmed hardware defect. Opened software and consumables are non-returnable.
termsPage.s5Desc: Custom PC systems are covered by a 2-year parts and labour warranty. Individual components carry their manufacturer's warranty. Warranty is void if the product is damaged through misuse, unauthorised modification, or physical damage.
termsPage.s6Desc: GamingStore's total liability for any claim shall not exceed the price paid for the product giving rise to the claim. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
termsPage.s7Desc: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of New York. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of New York County.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Settings
cookiesPage.intro: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to improve your browsing experience, analyse site traffic, and personalise content. You can manage your preferences below.
cookiesPage.c1Desc: These cookies are required for the site to function. They keep your cart active, manage your session, and enable secure checkout. They cannot be disabled.
cookiesPage.c2Desc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our site (Google Analytics). All data is anonymised and aggregated — we never track individuals.
cookiesPage.c3Desc: Allow us to show you relevant ads on other websites and measure ad effectiveness. Disabling these will not remove ads, just make them less relevant.
cookiesPage.c4Desc: Remember your site preferences — language, currency, theme — so you don't have to set them every visit.
